title: Tickets, Assets, CMDB, Knowledge, SLAs, and Support Evidence
description: A service desk has duplicate tickets, vague priorities, mismatched asset records, copied solutions, breached response targets, excessive personal data, and no causal closure evidence. Learners cumulatively produce auditable accessible support record system through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Record requester-safe contact, user impact, scope, severity, service, asset, environment, time, symptom, baseline, reproduction, changes, evidence, owner, state, and next action.
Distinguish urgency, impact, severity, priority, response, restore, resolution, escalation, service target, business hours, pause condition, and communication commitment.
Relate physical and logical assets, configuration items, owners, locations, dependencies, versions, relationships, lifecycle, discovery, confidence, and history.
